lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused var), no errors

notes: Added suppressHydrationWarning to both DropdownMenuTrigger child elements in header.tsx: (1) the user avatar Button on line 55, and (2) the perspective switcher button on line 106. Radix increments internal IDs during render; client-only Radix components on gap-analysis/tools pages shift that counter, causing a mismatch on the header DropdownMenuTrigger aria-controls/id attributes. suppressHydrationWarning silences the mismatch without affecting functionality.
